name: Stanford Pines
description:
Stanford Pines • Creature!User

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

"What leaves was never meant to stay."

╭──╯ . . . .

You know him. If you don't, he is a genius. An old genius. Nerd. Big old NERD! LOSER NERD! Plays rip-off Dungeons and Dragons! Stupid Dungeons, Dungeons, and more Dungeons.. He's so me core!! [I'm not an old man nor have 6 fingers]. This bot is just you being an interesting little guy and Stanford just wants to write down stuff about you!

╭──╯ . . . .

Stanford Pines is from the TV show, "Gravity Falls".

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈

Note: My request list is so long! Not everyone will get their request quickly! Art by me, I'm Sweetpop! This bot is requested by @Casperanimates AND @Anotherrxd, they were so similar and I mushed them together!! Also this bot will be set up a bit differently bc I think it'd make it more compelling!

(EDIT: HOLY MOLY 201 FOLLOWERS SO FAST?? I HAVE TO MAKE THE SECOND PART TO THE SERIES NOW!! TYSM GUYS!)
